Package iwedia.dtv.pvr

Interface PvrListener

public interface PvrListener
The PVR related callbacks.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    eventDeviceError()
    Some device error occurred.
    void
    eventInfoChanged(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.EventInfo info)
     
    void
    eventMediaAdd(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventMediaAdd pvrEventMediaAdd)
    PVR media event is successfully recorded and added to list of recorded events.
    void
    eventMediaCopied(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventMediaCopied pvrEventMediaCopied)
    PVR media event is successfully copied recorded event.
    void
    eventMediaRemove(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventMediaRemove pvrEventMediaRemove)
    PVR media event is successfully removed from list of recorded events.
    void
    eventPlaybackError(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackError pvrEventPlaybackError)
    Called when error happens during pvr playback
    void
    eventPlaybackJump(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackJump pvrEventPlaybackJump)
    PVR event playback jump successful.
    void
    eventPlaybackPosition(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackPosition pvrEventPlaybackPosition)
    PVR event playback position is changed.
    void
    eventPlaybackSpeed(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackSpeed pvrEventPlaybackSpeed)
    PVR event playback speed is changed.
    void
    eventPlaybackStart(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackStart pvrEventPlaybackStart)
    PVR event media playback is started.
    void
    eventPlaybackStop(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackStop pvrEventPlaybackStop)
    PVR event media playback is stopped.
    void
    eventRecordAdd(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordAdd pvrEventRecordAdd)
    Record is added to record list.
    void
    eventRecordConflict(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordConflict pvrEventRecordConflict)
    Error while trying to add event to record list.
    void
    eventRecordError(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordError pvrEventRecordError)
    Called when error happens during pvr recording
    void
    eventRecordHandle(int handle)
    Called after either ontouch, timer or smart record was created.
    void
    eventRecordPosition(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordPosition pvrEventRecordPosition)
    Event recording position is changed.
    void
    eventRecordRemove(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordRemove pvrEventRecordRemove)
    Record is removed from record list.
    void
    eventRecordResourceIssue(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordResourceIssue pvrEventRecordResourceIssue)
    Error with resource while PVR recording is in progress (example: No more space on USB drive).
    void
    eventRecordStart(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordStart pvrEventRecordStart)
    Event recording is started.
    void
    eventRecordStop(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordStop pvrEventRecordStop)
    Event recording is stopped.
    void
    eventTimeshiftJump(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftJump pvrEventTimeshiftJump)
    PVR timeshift jump is successful.
    void
    eventTimeshiftPosition(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftPosition pvrEventTimeshiftPosition)
    PVR timeshift playback position is changed.
    void
    eventTimeshiftSpeed(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftSpeed pvrEventTimeshiftSpeed)
    PVR timeshift playback speed is changed.
    void
    eventTimeshiftStart(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftStart pvrEventTimeshiftStart)
    PVR timeshift is started.
    void
    eventTimeshiftStop(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftStop pvrEventTimeshiftStop)
    PVR timeshift is stopped.
    void
    eventWakeUpTimer(int timerId)
    Called when wake-up timer is triggered

  • Method Details

    • eventDeviceError

      void eventDeviceError()
      Some device error occurred.

    • eventRecordStart

      void eventRecordStart(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordStart pvrEventRecordStart)
      Event recording is started.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordStart - Record started info object (PvrEventRecordStart).

    • eventRecordStop

      void eventRecordStop(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordStop pvrEventRecordStop)
      Event recording is stopped.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordStop - Record stopped info object (PvrEventRecordStop).

    • eventRecordPosition

      void eventRecordPosition(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordPosition pvrEventRecordPosition)
      Event recording position is changed.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordPosition - Record position container object (PvrEventRecordPosition).

    • eventRecordAdd

      void eventRecordAdd(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordAdd pvrEventRecordAdd)
      Record is added to record list.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordAdd - PVR record event container (PvrEventRecordAdd).

    • eventRecordRemove

      void eventRecordRemove(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordRemove pvrEventRecordRemove)
      Record is removed from record list.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordRemove - PVR record event container (PvrEventRecordRemove).

    • eventRecordConflict

      void eventRecordConflict(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordConflict pvrEventRecordConflict)
      Error while trying to add event to record list.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordConflict - PVR record event container (PvrEventRecordConflict).

    • eventRecordResourceIssue

      void eventRecordResourceIssue(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventRecordResourceIssue pvrEventRecordResourceIssue)
      Error with resource while PVR recording is in progress (example: No more space on USB drive).
      Parameters:
      pvrEventRecordResourceIssue - PVR record event container (PvrEventRecordResourceIssue).

    • eventMediaAdd

      void eventMediaAdd(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventMediaAdd pvrEventMediaAdd)
      PVR media event is successfully recorded and added to list of recorded events.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventMediaAdd - PVR record event container (PvrEventMediaAdd).

    • eventMediaCopied

      void eventMediaCopied(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventMediaCopied pvrEventMediaCopied)
      PVR media event is successfully copied recorded event.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventMediaAdd - PVR record event container (PvrEventMediaAdd).

    • eventMediaRemove

      void eventMediaRemove(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventMediaRemove pvrEventMediaRemove)
      PVR media event is successfully removed from list of recorded events.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventMediaRemove - PVR record event container (PvrEventMediaRemove).

    • eventPlaybackStart

      void eventPlaybackStart(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackStart pvrEventPlaybackStart)
      PVR event media playback is started.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventPlaybackStart - PVR record event container (PvrEventPlaybackStart).

    • eventPlaybackStop

      void eventPlaybackStop(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackStop pvrEventPlaybackStop)
      PVR event media playback is stopped.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventPlaybackStop - PVR record event container (PvrEventPlaybackStop).

    • eventPlaybackPosition

      void eventPlaybackPosition(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackPosition pvrEventPlaybackPosition)
      PVR event playback position is changed.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventPlaybackPosition - Recorded PVR event position container object ( PvrEventPlaybackPosition).

    • eventPlaybackSpeed

      void eventPlaybackSpeed(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackSpeed pvrEventPlaybackSpeed)
      PVR event playback speed is changed.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventPlaybackSpeed - Recorded PVR event playback speed container object ( PvrEventPlaybackSpeed).

    • eventPlaybackJump

      void eventPlaybackJump(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventPlaybackJump pvrEventPlaybackJump)
      PVR event playback jump successful.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventPlaybackJump - Recorded PVR event playback jump container object ( PvrEventPlaybackJump).

      Parameters:
      pvrEventTimeshiftStart - PVR timeshift started container object ( PvrEventTimeshiftStart).

      void eventTimeshiftStop(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftStop pvrEventTimeshiftStop)
      PVR timeshift is stopped.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventTimeshiftStop - PVR timeshift stopped container object ( PvrEventTimeshiftStop).

    • eventTimeshiftPosition

      void eventTimeshiftPosition(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftPosition pvrEventTimeshiftPosition)
      PVR timeshift playback position is changed.
      Parameters:
      pvrEventTimeshiftPosition - PVR timeshift position container object ( PvrEventTimeshiftPosition).

    • eventTimeshiftSpeed

      void eventTimeshiftSpeed(com.iwedia.dtv.pvr.PvrEventTimeshiftSpeed pvrEventTimeshiftSpeed)
      PVR timeshift playback speed is changed.
      Parameters:

      pvrEventTimeshiftJump - PVR timeshift jump container object ( PvrEventTimeshiftJump).

      pvrEventRecordError - - Error value
